prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A "User" type card on the far left showing fields: name (string), age (number), email (string). Three transformation arrows lead to three variant cards on the right. Top variant "Readonly<User>": same fields but each has a lock icon and shield, all properties frozen. Middle variant "Partial<User>": same fields but each has a "?" badge, all optional. Bottom variant "Nullable<User>": same fields but each shows "| null" appended, with a ghost icon. The original card is clearly the source, and each variant shows how mapped types systematically transform every property. Color coding distinguishes each transformation: blue for readonly, green for partial, purple for nullable.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
